qa_pairs.question: What types of leave are available to me as an employee?
How do I apply for leave, and what's the process like?
Can I take leave during my first few weeks of employment?
What happens if I need to take a longer period of leave, such as a vacation or family emergency?
How do you define 'Immediate Family' for the purposes of this policy?
How many annual leave days do I get in my first year?
If I join mid-year, how will my pro-rated leave be calculated?
Can I carry forward any unused annual leave to the next year?
What happens if I don't use my carried-forward leave within the first quarter of the next year?
Can I encash some of my annual leave, or is it only possible when I resign from the company?
What does 'outpatient leave' mean, and how is it different from hospitalization?
How do I get a medical certificate (MC) if I need to take sick leave?
What happens if I don't have enough annual leave balance for an extended illness? Can I still apply for unpaid leave?
Can I schedule a medical appointment during work hours, or do I need to take time off?
What's the process if my doctor says I need more than 60 days of hospitalization? Can I apply for additional leave?
How do I know if I'm eligible for maternity/paternity leave?
Can I take my study leave at the same time as another type of special leave?
What happens if I need to take compassionate leave for an extended family member, but it's not within the first day?
Can I use my marriage leave at a different time than when I get married?
How do I request special leave, and what documentation might I need to provide?
How do I submit my leave application?
What happens if I forget to apply for leave in advance, but it's an emergency situation?
Can I take unpaid leave if I need to attend to a personal matter?
What happens on public holidays when the company is closed? Do I still get paid?
How often will this leave policy be reviewed, and what changes can I expect to see?
